channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Palestinians in West Bank protest, strike against Israeli death penalty law
item.description: Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas's Fatah party had called for the strike.

item.title: Memorial honours Indonesian UN peacekeeper killed in Lebanon
item.description: Families and colleagues held a memorial for UN peacekeeper Farizal Rhomadhon.

item.title: Why Iran says its universities are being targeted
item.description: Iran reportedly follows through on threat on American universities, after attacks on two Iranian research universities.

item.title: Iran authorities await war ‘victory’ as supporters mark 1979 anniversary
item.description: Officials, government supporters take to streets to mark Islamic Republic Day, even as US, Israel continue bombing.

item.title: Iranian officials ‘laugh’ at Trump’s claim Iran wants a ceasefire
item.description: A senior Iranian official has laughed in response to US President Donald Trump's claim that Iran asked for a ceasefire.

item.title: Kenya’s tea industry suffers crisis caused by the US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description: Kenyan tea farmers are facing a crisis after the US-Israeli war on Iran disrupted key export routes to the Middle East.

item.title: UK to host meeting of 35 countries on reopening Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Before talks with 35 countries, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer says reopening strait 'will not be easy'.

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei’s rumoured injury or death won’t change Iran’s trajectory
item.description: His father, Ali Khamenei, built the supreme leader's office into an institution that does not depend on a single leader.

item.title: Iran War: What a Marine Expeditionary Unit is – and other US military terms
item.description: The US has deployed thousands of additional Marines and airborne troops to the Middle East since the Iran war began.

item.title: Iran denies Trump’s claim Iranian president requested ceasefire
item.description: Donald Trump says US will continue 'blasting Iran into oblivion' until Strait of Hormuz is reopened.
